{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\services\\suitRenderer.ts","streamContent":"import { MockSuit } from '../data/mockSuits';\n\nexport interface Keypoint {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n  score: number;\n}\n\nexport interface BodyAnchors {\n  shoulderLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  shoulderRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  neck: { x: number; y: number };\n  elbowLeft?: { x: number; y: number };\n  elbowRight?: { x: number; y: number };\n  wristLeft?: { x: number; y: number };\n  wristRight?: { x: number; y: number };\n}\n\nexport function keypointsToAnchors(keypoints: Keypoint[]): BodyAnchors | null {\n  const kp = (i: number) => keypoints[i];\n  const ok = (i: number) => kp(i) && kp(i).score > 0.3;\n  if (!ok(5) || !ok(6) || !ok(11) || !ok(12)) return null;\n\n  const neck = ok(0)\n    ? { x: kp(0).x, y: kp(0).y }\n    : {\n        x: (kp(5).x + kp(6).x) / 2,\n        y: (kp(5).y + kp(6).y) / 2 - 30,\n      };\n\n  return {\n    shoulderLeft: { x: kp(5).x, y: kp(5).y },\n    shoulderRight: { x: kp(6).x, y: kp(6).y },\n    hipLeft: { x: kp(11).x, y: kp(11).y },\n    hipRight: { x: kp(12).x, y: kp(12).y },\n    neck,\n    elbowLeft: ok(7) ? { x: kp(7).x, y: kp(7).y } : undefined,\n    elbowRight: ok(8) ? { x: kp(8).x, y: kp(8).y } : undefined,\n    wristLeft: ok(9) ? { x: kp(9).x, y: kp(9).y } : undefined,\n    wristRight: ok(10) ? { x: kp(10).x, y: kp(10).y } : undefined,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction darken(hex: string, amount: number): string {\n  const n = parseInt(hex.slice(1), 16);\n  const r = Math.max(0, ((n >> 16) & 0xff) - amount);\n  const g = Math.max(0, ((n >> 8) & 0xff) - amount);\n  const b = Math.max(0, (n & 0xff) - amount);\n  return `#${((r << 16) | (g << 8) | b).toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`;\n}\n\nfunction drawPinstripe(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  x: number,\n  y: number,\n  w: number,\n  h: number,\n  base: string\n) {\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.strokeStyle = darken(base, 25);\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.25;\n  ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n  for (let i = 0; i < w; i += 12) {\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.moveTo(x + i, y);\n    ctx.lineTo(x + i, y + h);\n    ctx.stroke();\n  }\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n\n/** 正面スーツ描画 */\nfunction drawFrontSuit(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  anchors: BodyAnchors,\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  params: { shoulderWidth: number; torsoLength: number; sleeveLength: number; jacketLength: number }\n) {\n  const cx = (anchors.shoulderLeft.x + anchors.shoulderRight.x) / 2;\n  const shoulderY = (anchors.shoulderLeft.y + anchors.shoulderRight.y) / 2;\n  const hipY = (anchors.hipLeft.y + anchors.hipRight.y) / 2;\n  const sw = params.shoulderWidth;\n  const jl = params.jacketLength;\n\n  const jacketTop = shoulderY - 8;\n  const jacketBottom = shoulderY + jl;\n  const lapelW = sw*  0.12;\n\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.fillStyle = suit.colorHex;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.82;\n\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(anchors.shoulderLeft.x - sw  *0.05, jacketTop);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderRight.x + sw*  0.05, jacketTop);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderRight.x + sw  *0.08, jacketBottom);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx, jacketBottom + 20);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderLeft.x - sw*  0.08, jacketBottom);\n  ctx.closePath();\n  ctx.fill();\n\n  if (suit.pattern === 'pinstripe') {\n    drawPinstripe(ctx, cx - sw / 2, jacketTop, sw, jl, suit.colorHex);\n  }\n\n  ctx.fillStyle = darken(suit.colorHex, 30);\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(cx - lapelW, jacketTop);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx - lapelW  *0.3, hipY);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx, hipY - 10);\n  ctx.closePath();\n  ctx.fill();\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(cx + lapelW, jacketTop);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx + lapelW*  0.3, hipY);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx, hipY - 10);\n  ctx.closePath();\n  ctx.fill();\n\n  ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9;\n  for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.arc(cx - 8, shoulderY + jl  *0.35 + i*  28, 4, 0, Math.PI  *2);\n    ctx.fill();\n  }\n\n  ctx.strokeStyle = darken(suit.colorHex, 40);\n  ctx.lineWidth = 3;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.75;\n  const drawSleeve = (shoulder: { x: number; y: number }, elbow?: { x: number; y: number }, wrist?: { x: number; y: number }) => {\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.moveTo(shoulder.x, shoulder.y);\n    if (elbow) ctx.lineTo(elbow.x, elbow.y);\n    if (wrist) ctx.lineTo(wrist.x, wrist.y);\n    else ctx.lineTo(shoulder.x, shoulder.y + params.sleeveLength);\n    ctx.stroke();\n  };\n  drawSleeve(anchors.shoulderLeft, anchors.elbowLeft, anchors.wristLeft);\n  drawSleeve(anchors.shoulderRight, anchors.elbowRight, anchors.wristRight);\n\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n\n/** 横向きスーツ描画 */\nfunction drawSideSuit(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  anchors: BodyAnchors,\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  params: { shoulderWidth: number; torsoLength: number; sleeveLength: number; jacketLength: number },\n  facingRight: boolean\n) {\n  const dir = facingRight ? 1 : -1;\n  const shoulder = facingRight ? anchors.shoulderRight : anchors.shoulderLeft;\n  const hip = facingRight ? anchors.hipRight : anchors.hipLeft;\n  const elbow = facingRight ? anchors.elbowRight : anchors.elbowLeft;\n  const sw = params.shoulderWidth*  0.55;\n\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.fillStyle = suit.colorHex;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.82;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(shoulder.x - sw  *0.3*  dir, shoulder.y - 5);\n  ctx.lineTo(shoulder.x + sw  *0.5*  dir, shoulder.y - 5);\n  ctx.lineTo(hip.x + sw  *0.4*  dir, hip.y + params.jacketLength  *0.5);\n  ctx.lineTo(hip.x - sw*  0.2  *dir, hip.y + params.jacketLength*  0.55);\n  ctx.closePath();\n  ctx.fill();\n\n  ctx.strokeStyle = darken(suit.colorHex, 35);\n  ctx.lineWidth = 4;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.8;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(shoulder.x, shoulder.y);\n  if (elbow) ctx.lineTo(elbow.x, elbow.y);\n  else ctx.lineTo(shoulder.x + dir  *params.sleeveLength*  0.6, shoulder.y + params.sleeveLength  *0.5);\n  ctx.stroke();\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n\n/** 背面スーツ描画 */\nfunction drawBackSuit(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  anchors: BodyAnchors,\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  params: { shoulderWidth: number; jacketLength: number }\n) {\n  const cx = (anchors.shoulderLeft.x + anchors.shoulderRight.x) / 2;\n  const shoulderY = (anchors.shoulderLeft.y + anchors.shoulderRight.y) / 2;\n  const sw = params.shoulderWidth;\n\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.fillStyle = suit.colorHex;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.82;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(anchors.shoulderLeft.x - sw*  0.05, shoulderY);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderRight.x + sw  *0.05, shoulderY);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderRight.x + sw*  0.06, shoulderY + params.jacketLength);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx, shoulderY + params.jacketLength + 15);\n  ctx.lineTo(anchors.shoulderLeft.x - sw  *0.06, shoulderY + params.jacketLength);\n  ctx.closePath();\n  ctx.fill();\n\n  ctx.strokeStyle = darken(suit.colorHex, 50);\n  ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.6;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(cx, shoulderY);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx, shoulderY + params.jacketLength);\n  ctx.stroke();\n\n  const ventY = shoulderY + params.jacketLength*  0.7;\n  ctx.beginPath();\n  ctx.moveTo(cx - 15, ventY);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx - 15, shoulderY + params.jacketLength);\n  ctx.moveTo(cx + 15, ventY);\n  ctx.lineTo(cx + 15, shoulderY + params.jacketLength);\n  ctx.stroke();\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n\nexport function renderSuitComposite(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  photo: HTMLImageElement,\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270,\n  keypoints: Keypoint[],\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  bodyType: string,\n  sleeveLengthCm: number,\n  clothSim: import('./clothSimulation2d').ClothSimulation2D\n) {\n  const w = ctx.canvas.width;\n  const h = ctx.canvas.height;\n  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.drawImage(photo, 0, 0, w, h);\n\n  const anchors = keypointsToAnchors(keypoints);\n  if (!anchors) return;\n\n  const { computeSuitDrawParams } = require('./suitPatternParams') as typeof import('./suitPatternParams');\n  const params = computeSuitDrawParams(anchors, bodyType, sleeveLengthCm);\n\n  if (direction === 0) {\n    drawFrontSuit(ctx, anchors, suit, params);\n    const cx = (anchors.shoulderLeft.x + anchors.shoulderRight.x) / 2;\n    const sw = params.shoulderWidth;\n    const sy = (anchors.shoulderLeft.y + anchors.shoulderRight.y) / 2;\n    const hy = (anchors.hipLeft.y + anchors.hipRight.y) / 2;\n    clothSim.initJacketPanel(\n      { x: cx - sw  *0.4, y: sy },\n      { x: cx + sw*  0.4, y: sy },\n      { x: cx - sw  *0.35, y: hy + params.jacketLength*  0.3 },\n      { x: cx + sw  *0.35, y: hy + params.jacketLength*  0.3 }\n    );\n    clothSim.pinShoulders(anchors.shoulderLeft, anchors.shoulderRight);\n    clothSim.simulate(4);\n    clothSim.drawWrinkles(ctx, darken(suit.colorHex, 60), 0.2);\n  } else if (direction === 90) {\n    drawSideSuit(ctx, anchors, suit, params, true);\n  } else if (direction === 180) {\n    drawBackSuit(ctx, anchors, suit, params);\n  } else {\n    drawSideSuit(ctx, anchors, suit, params, false);\n  }\n}\n"}

### Tool Edit File V2

```

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\services\\clothSimulation2d.ts","streamContent":"/** 2D Verlet 布シミュレーション（Canvas描画用） */\nexport interface SimParams {\n  gravity: number;\n  damping: number;\n  constraintIterations: number;\n  segmentsX: number;\n  segmentsY: number;\n}\n\nexport class SimParticle {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n  prevX: number;\n  prevY: number;\n  pinned: boolean;\n\n  constructor(x: number, y: number, pinned = false) {\n    this.x = x;\n    this.y = y;\n    this.prevX = x;\n    this.prevY = y;\n    this.pinned = pinned;\n  }\n\n  update(gravity: number, damping: number) {\n    if (this.pinned) return;\n    const vx = (this.x - this.prevX)*  damping;\n    const vy = (this.y - this.prevY)  *damping;\n    this.prevX = this.x;\n    this.prevY = this.y;\n    this.x += vx;\n    this.y += vy + gravity;\n  }\n}\n\nexport class SimConstraint {\n  p1: SimParticle;\n  p2: SimParticle;\n  restLength: number;\n\n  constructor(p1: SimParticle, p2: SimParticle) {\n    this.p1 = p1;\n    this.p2 = p2;\n    this.restLength = Math.hypot(p2.x - p1.x, p2.y - p1.y);\n  }\n\n  solve() {\n    const dx = this.p2.x - this.p1.x;\n    const dy = this.p2.y - this.p1.y;\n    const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy) || 0.0001;\n    const diff = (this.restLength - dist) / dist;\n    const ox = dx*  diff  *0.5;\n    const oy = dy*  diff  *0.5;\n    if (!this.p1.pinned) {\n      this.p1.x -= ox;\n      this.p1.y -= oy;\n    }\n    if (!this.p2.pinned) {\n      this.p2.x += ox;\n      this.p2.y += oy;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport class ClothSimulation2D {\n  particles: SimParticle[] = [];\n  constraints: SimConstraint[] = [];\n  cols = 0;\n  rows = 0;\n\n  constructor(\n    private params: SimParams = {\n      gravity: 0.35,\n      damping: 0.97,\n      constraintIterations: 4,\n      segmentsX: 8,\n      segmentsY: 10,\n    }\n  ) {}\n\n  initJacketPanel(\n    topLeft: { x: number; y: number },\n    topRight: { x: number; y: number },\n    bottomLeft: { x: number; y: number },\n    bottomRight: { x: number; y: number }\n  ) {\n    this.particles = [];\n    this.constraints = [];\n    const sx = this.params.segmentsX;\n    const sy = this.params.segmentsY;\n    this.cols = sx + 1;\n    this.rows = sy + 1;\n\n    for (let j = 0; j <= sy; j++) {\n      const t = j / sy;\n      const leftX = topLeft.x + (bottomLeft.x - topLeft.x)*  t;\n      const leftY = topLeft.y + (bottomLeft.y - topLeft.y)  *t;\n      const rightX = topRight.x + (bottomRight.x - topRight.x)*  t;\n      const rightY = topRight.y + (bottomRight.y - topRight.y)  *t;\n\n      for (let i = 0; i <= sx; i++) {\n        const u = i / sx;\n        const x = leftX + (rightX - leftX)*  u;\n        const y = leftY + (rightY - leftY)  *u;\n        const pinned = j === 0 && (i === 0 || i === sx);\n        this.particles.push(new SimParticle(x, y, pinned));\n      }\n    }\n\n    for (let j = 0; j <= sy; j++) {\n      for (let i = 0; i <= sx; i++) {\n        const idx = j*  this.cols + i;\n        if (i < sx) this.constraints.push(new SimConstraint(this.particles[idx], this.particles[idx + 1]));\n        if (j < sy) this.constraints.push(new SimConstraint(this.particles[idx], this.particles[idx + this.cols]));\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  pinShoulders(left: { x: number; y: number }, right: { x: number; y: number }) {\n    if (this.particles.length === 0) return;\n    this.particles[0].x = left.x;\n    this.particles[0].y = left.y;\n    this.particles[0].prevX = left.x;\n    this.particles[0].prevY = left.y;\n    const rightIdx = this.cols - 1;\n    this.particles[rightIdx].x = right.x;\n    this.particles[rightIdx].y = right.y;\n    this.particles[rightIdx].prevX = right.x;\n    this.particles[rightIdx].prevY = right.y;\n  }\n\n  simulate(steps = 3) {\n    for (let s = 0; s < steps; s++) {\n      this.particles.forEach((p) => p.update(this.params.gravity, this.params.damping));\n      for (let i = 0; i < this.params.constraintIterations; i++) {\n        this.constraints.forEach((c) => c.solve());\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  drawWrinkles(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, color: string, alpha = 0.15) {\n    [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n    ctx.strokeStyle = color;\n    ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n    ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n\n    for (let j = 0; j < this.rows - 1; j++) {\n      ctx.beginPath();\n      for (let i = 0; i < this.cols; i++) {\n        const p = this.particles[j  *this.cols + i];\n        if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);\n        else ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\n      }\n      ctx.stroke();\n    }\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.cols - 1; i++) {\n      ctx.beginPath();\n      for (let j = 0; j < this.rows; j++) {\n        const p = this.particles[j*  this.cols + i];\n        if (j === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);\n        else ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);\n      }\n      ctx.stroke();\n    }\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n}\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\data\\mockSuits.ts","streamContent":"export interface MockSuit {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  colorName: string;\n  colorHex: string;\n  pattern: 'solid' | 'pinstripe' | 'herringbone';\n  style: 'slim' | 'regular' | 'classic';\n  matchBase: number;\n  description: string;\n}\n\nexport const MOCK_SUITS: MockSuit[] = [\n  {\n    id: 'suit-001',\n    name: 'Super 120s 純粋ウール',\n    colorName: 'ダークネイビー',\n    colorHex: '#1a2744',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'slim',\n    matchBase: 96,\n    description: '上質ウールの定番ネイビー。ビジネスシーンに最適。',\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-002',\n    name: 'イタリアンウール 2ボタン',\n    colorName: 'チャコールグレー',\n    colorHex: '#3d4555',\n    pattern: 'pinstripe',\n    style: 'regular',\n    matchBase: 92,\n    description: '細ストライプが知的な印象を与えるグレースーツ。',\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-003',\n    name: 'モヘアブレンド スリーピース',\n    colorName: 'ミディアムグレー',\n    colorHex: '#6b7280',\n    pattern: 'herringbone',\n    style: 'classic',\n    matchBase: 88,\n    description: 'ヘリンボーン柄がクラシックな雰囲気を演出。',\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-004',\n    name: 'トロピカルウール サマー',\n    colorName: 'ライトグレー',\n    colorHex: '#9ca3af',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'slim',\n    matchBase: 85,\n    description: '通気性に優れた夏向けライトトーン。',\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-005',\n    name: 'フランネル ウィンター',\n    colorName: 'ダークブラウン',\n    colorHex: '#4a3728',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'regular',\n    matchBase: 90,\n    description: '秋冬に映える深みのあるブラウン。',\n  },\n];\n\nexport function getMockSuitById(id: string): MockSuit {\n  return MOCK_SUITS.find((s) => [s.id](http://s.id) === id) || MOCK_SUITS[0];\n}\n\nexport function mockSuitFromDiagnosis(\n  recommended: { id: string; name: string; color: string; matchPercentage: number },\n  index: number\n): MockSuit {\n  const base = MOCK_SUITS[index % MOCK_SUITS.length];\n  return {\n    ...base,\n    id: [recommended.id](http://recommended.id) || [base.id](http://base.id),\n    name: [recommended.name](http://recommended.name) || [base.name](http://base.name),\n    colorName: recommended.color || base.colorName,\n    matchBase: recommended.matchPercentage || base.matchBase,\n  };\n}\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\components\\VirtualTryOn.tsx","streamContent":"import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';\nimport { CaptureData } from './PoseEstimation';\nimport { DiagnosisData } from './DiagnosisResult';\nimport { ClothSimulation2D } from '../services/clothSimulation2d';\nimport { renderSuitComposite } from '../services/suitRenderer';\nimport { MOCK_SUITS, MockSuit, getMockSuitById } from '../data/mockSuits';\nimport './VirtualTryOn.css';\n\nconst DIRECTIONS: Array<0 | 90 | 180 | 270> = [0, 90, 180, 270];\nconst DIRECTION_LABELS: Record<number, string> = {\n  0: '正面',\n  90: '右側',\n  180: '後ろ',\n  270: '左側',\n};\n\ninterface VirtualTryOnProps {\n  captures: CaptureData[];\n  diagnosis: DiagnosisData;\n  onExit: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction loadImage(src: string): Promise<HTMLImageElement> {\n  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n    const img = new Image();\n    img.onload = () => resolve(img);\n    img.onerror = reject;\n    img.src = src;\n  });\n}\n\nfunction angleToDirection(angle: number): 0 | 90 | 180 | 270 {\n  const normalized = ((angle % 360) + 360) % 360;\n  if (normalized < 45 || normalized >= 315) return 0;\n  if (normalized < 135) return 90;\n  if (normalized < 225) return 180;\n  return 270;\n}\n\nfunction lerpAngle(from: number, to: number, t: number): number {\n  let diff = to - from;\n  if (diff > 180) diff -= 360;\n  if (diff < -180) diff += 360;\n  return from + diff  *t;\n}\n\nexport const VirtualTryOn: React.FC<VirtualTryOnProps> = ({\n  captures,\n  diagnosis,\n  onExit,\n}) => {\n  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);\n  const clothSimRef = useRef(new ClothSimulation2D());\n  const compositeCacheRef = useRef<Map<string, HTMLCanvasElement>>(new Map());\n  const dragRef = useRef<{ startX: number; startAngle: number } | null>(null);\n\n  const [rotationAngle, setRotationAngle] = useState(0);\n  const [selectedSuitId, setSelectedSuitId] = useState(\n    diagnosis.recommendedSuits[0]?.id || MOCK_SUITS[0].id\n  );\n  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);\n  const [renderTick, setRenderTick] = useState(0);\n\n  const selectedSuit = getMockSuitById(selectedSuitId);\n  const recommended = diagnosis.recommendedSuits.find((s) => [s.id](http://s.id) === selectedSuitId);\n\n  const buildCompositeKey = useCallback(\n    (direction: number, suitId: string) =>* `${direction}-${suitId}`*,\n    []\n  );\n\n  const renderComposite = useCallback(\n    async (direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270, suit: MockSuit) => {\n      const key = buildCompositeKey(direction, [suit.id](http://suit.id));\n      if (compositeCacheRef.current.has(key)) return;\n\n      const capture = captures.find((c) => c.direction === direction);\n      if (!capture?.imageDataUrl) return;\n\n      const photo = await loadImage(capture.imageDataUrl);\n      const offscreen = document.createElement('canvas');\n      offscreen.width = 720;\n      offscreen.height = 1280;\n      const ctx = offscreen.getContext('2d');\n      if (!ctx) return;\n\n      renderSuitComposite(\n        ctx,\n        photo,\n        direction,\n        capture.keypoints,\n        suit,\n        diagnosis.bodyType,\n        diagnosis.suitSize.sleeveLengthCm,\n        clothSimRef.current\n      );\n\n      compositeCacheRef.current.set(key, offscreen);\n      setRenderTick((t) => t + 1);\n    },\n    [buildCompositeKey, captures, diagnosis]\n  );\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    compositeCacheRef.current.clear();\n    DIRECTIONS.forEach((d) => {\n      renderComposite(d, selectedSuit);\n    });\n  }, [selectedSuitId, captures, renderComposite, selectedSuit]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!canvas) return;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const dirA = angleToDirection(rotationAngle);\n    const dirB = angleToDirection(rotationAngle + 45);\n    const t = (rotationAngle % 90) / 90;\n\n    const keyA = buildCompositeKey(dirA, selectedSuitId);\n    const keyB = buildCompositeKey(dirB, selectedSuitId);\n    const imgA = compositeCacheRef.current.get(keyA);\n    const imgB = compositeCacheRef.current.get(keyB);\n\n    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#0b1424';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    if (imgA && imgB && dirA !== dirB) {\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1 - t;\n      ctx.drawImage(imgA, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = t;\n      ctx.drawImage(imgB, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n    } else if (imgA) {\n      ctx.drawImage(imgA, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    }\n  }, [rotationAngle, selectedSuitId, renderTick, buildCompositeKey]);\n\n  const handlePointerDown = (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n    dragRef.current = { startX: e.clientX, startAngle: rotationAngle };\n    setIsDragging(true);\n    ([e.target](http://e.target) as HTMLElement).setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);\n  };\n\n  const handlePointerMove = (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n    if (!dragRef.current) return;\n    const dx = e.clientX - dragRef.current.startX;\n    setRotationAngle(dragRef.current.startAngle + dx*  0.5);\n  };\n\n  const handlePointerUp = () => {\n    if (!dragRef.current) return;\n    const snap = Math.round(dragRef.current.startAngle / 90)  *90;\n    const dragged = rotationAngle;\n    const nearest = Math.round(dragged / 90)*  90;\n    setRotationAngle(nearest);\n    dragRef.current = null;\n    setIsDragging(false);\n  };\n\n  const currentLabel = DIRECTION_LABELS[angleToDirection(rotationAngle)];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"virtual-tryon\">\n      <header className=\"tryon-header\">\n        <p className=\"tryon-brand\">VIRTUAL FITTING</p>\n        <h1>バーチャル試着</h1>\n        <p className=\"tryon-sub\">ドラッグして360°確認</p>\n      </header>\n\n      <div className=\"tryon-layout\">\n        <div className=\"tryon-viewer-wrap\">\n          <canvas\n            ref={canvasRef}\n            width={720}\n            height={1280}\n            className=`tryon-canvas ${isDragging ? 'dragging' : ''}`}\n            onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}\n            onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}\n            onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}\n            onPointerLeave={handlePointerUp}\n          />\n          <div className=\"rotation-badge\">{currentLabel}</div>\n          <div className=\"rotation-dots\">\n            {[DIRECTIONS.map](http://DIRECTIONS.map)((d) => (\n              <button\n                key={d}\n                type=\"button\"\n                className=`rot-dot ${angleToDirection(rotationAngle) === d ? 'active' : ''}`}\n                onClick={() => setRotationAngle(d)}\n              >\n                {DIRECTION_LABELS[d]}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <aside className=\"tryon-sidebar\">\n          <div className=\"suit-info-card\">\n            <p className=\"sidebar-label\">SELECTED SUIT</p>\n            <h2>{[selectedSuit.name](http://selectedSuit.name)}</h2>\n            <div className=\"color-swatch\" style={{ background: selectedSuit.colorHex }} />\n            <dl className=\"suit-specs\">\n              <div>\n                <dt>カラー</dt>\n                <dd>{selectedSuit.colorName}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>サイズ</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.suitSize.jacketSize}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>マッチ率</dt>\n                <dd>{recommended?.matchPercentage ?? selectedSuit.matchBase}%</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>体型</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.bodyType}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>骨格</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.skeleton}</dd>\n              </div>\n            </dl>\n            <p className=\"suit-desc\">{selectedSuit.description}</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"suit-picker\">\n            <p className=\"sidebar-label\">別のスーツを試着</p>\n            <div className=\"suit-picker-list\">\n              {MOCK_[SUITS.map](http://SUITS.map)((suit) => (\n                <button\n                  key={[suit.id](http://suit.id)}\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=`suit-picker-item ${selectedSuitId === suit.id ? 'selected' : ''}`}\n                  onClick={() => setSelectedSuitId([suit.id](http://suit.id))}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"picker-swatch\" style={{ background: suit.colorHex }} />\n                  <span className=\"picker-name\">{suit.colorName}</span>\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <button type=\"button\" className=\"exit-btn\" onClick={onExit}>\n            試着を終了\n          </button>\n        </aside>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\components\\VirtualTryOn.css","streamContent":".virtual-tryon {\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #0b1424 0%, #152238 50%, #0f1a2e 100%);\n  color: #f7f8fa;\n  padding: 1rem 1.25rem 2rem;\n}\n\n.tryon-header {\n  text-align: center;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.tryon-brand {\n  font-size: 0.65rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.35em;\n  color: #c9a962;\n  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;\n}\n\n.tryon-header h1 {\n  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 1.6rem);\n  font-weight: 300;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  margin: 0;\n}\n\n.tryon-sub {\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: #8b95a5;\n  margin: 0.35rem 0 0;\n}\n\n.tryon-layout {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 1.25rem;\n  max-width: 1100px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n@media (min-width: 900px) {\n  .tryon-layout {\n    flex-direction: row;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n  }\n}\n\n.tryon-viewer-wrap {\n  position: relative;\n  flex: 1;\n  max-width: 420px;\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  width: 100%;\n}\n\n.tryon-canvas {\n  display: block;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: auto;\n  aspect-ratio: 9 / 16;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(201, 169, 98, 0.3);\n  cursor: grab;\n  touch-action: none;\n  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);\n}\n\n.tryon-canvas.dragging {\n  cursor: grabbing;\n}\n\n.rotation-badge {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 1rem;\n  left: 50%;\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  background: rgba(11, 20, 36, 0.85);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(201, 169, 98, 0.4);\n  color: #c9a962;\n  padding: 0.35rem 1rem;\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.rotation-dots {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n  margin-top: 0.75rem;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.rot-dot {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 149, 165, 0.3);\n  color: #8b95a5;\n  padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  font-size: 0.7rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.rot-dot.active,\n.rot-dot:hover {\n  border-color: #c9a962;\n  color: #c9a962;\n  background: rgba(201, 169, 98, 0.1);\n}\n\n.tryon-sidebar {\n  flex: 0 0 320px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 1rem;\n}\n\n.suit-info-card {\n  background: rgba(21, 34, 56, 0.9);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(201, 169, 98, 0.25);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.sidebar-label {\n  font-size: 0.65rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.2em;\n  color: #c9a962;\n  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.suit-info-card h2 {\n  font-size: 1.05rem;\n  font-weight: 400;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;\n}\n\n.color-swatch {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 8px;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.suit-specs {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 0.6rem 1rem;\n  margin: 0 0 1rem;\n}\n\n.suit-specs dt {\n  font-size: 0.65rem;\n  color: #8b95a5;\n  letter-spacing: 0.08em;\n  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;\n}\n\n.suit-specs dd {\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  margin: 0;\n  color: #f7f8fa;\n}\n\n.suit-desc {\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: #c8d0dc;\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  margin: 0;\n}\n\n.suit-picker {\n  background: rgba(21, 34, 56, 0.7);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 149, 165, 0.2);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n}\n\n.suit-picker-list {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.suit-picker-item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 149, 165, 0.2);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 0.6rem 0.75rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  color: #c8d0dc;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n  text-align: left;\n}\n\n.suit-picker-item.selected,\n.suit-picker-item:hover {\n  border-color: #c9a962;\n  background: rgba(201, 169, 98, 0.08);\n  color: #f7f8fa;\n}\n\n.picker-swatch {\n  width: 24px;\n  height: 24px;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);\n}\n\n.picker-name {\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n}\n\n.exit-btn {\n  width: 100%;\n  padding: 0.9rem;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 149, 165, 0.35);\n  color: #8b95a5;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.exit-btn:hover {\n  border-color: #c9a962;\n  color: #c9a962;\n}\n\n@media (orientation: portrait) {\n  .tryon-viewer-wrap {\n    max-width: 100%;\n  }\n}\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\App.tsx","streamContent":"import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { PoseEstimation, ScanPayload, CaptureData } from './components/PoseEstimation';\nimport {\n  DiagnosisResult,\n  DiagnosisData,\n  isValidDiagnosisData,\n} from './components/DiagnosisResult';\nimport { VirtualTryOn } from './components/VirtualTryOn';\nimport './App.css';\n\ntype AppView = 'scan' | 'result' | 'tryon';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [view, setView] = useState<AppView>('scan');\n  const [diagnosis, setDiagnosis] = useState<DiagnosisData | null>(null);\n  const [scanData, setScanData] = useState<ScanPayload | null>(null);\n  const [capturesWithImages, setCapturesWithImages] = useState<CaptureData[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [scanKey, setScanKey] = useState(0);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (diagnosis && !isValidDiagnosisData(diagnosis)) {\n      setDiagnosis(null);\n    }\n  }, [diagnosis]);\n\n  const handleDiagnose = useCallback(async (scanPayload: ScanPayload) => {\n    setScanData(scanPayload);\n    setCapturesWithImages(scanPayload.captures);\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const apiPayload = {\n        ...scanPayload,\n        captures: [scanPayload.captures.map](http://scanPayload.captures.map)(({ imageDataUrl, ...rest }) => rest),\n      };\n\n      const response = await fetch('[http://localhost:5000/api/diagnose](http://localhost:5000/api/diagnose)', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        body: JSON.stringify(apiPayload),\n      });\n\n      if (!response.ok) {\n        throw new Error('診断APIがエラーを返しました');\n      }\n\n      const data = await response.json();\n\n      if (!isValidDiagnosisData(data.result)) {\n        console.error('不正な診断レスポンス:', data.result);\n        alert(\n          '診断データの形式が正しくありません。\\nbackend で node server.js を再起動してから、もう一度お試しください。'\n        );\n        setScanKey((k) => k + 1);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setDiagnosis(data.result);\n      setView('result');\n      console.log('✅ 診断結果:', data.result);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('診断エラー:', err);\n      alert(\n        'サーバーに接続できません。backend/server.js が動いているか確認してください。'\n      );\n      setScanKey((k) => k + 1);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleStartVirtualTryOn = () => {\n    if (capturesWithImages.length < 4) {\n      alert('撮影データがありません。再度スキャンしてください。');\n      return;\n    }\n    setView('tryon');\n  };\n\n  const handleExitTryOn = () => {\n    setView('result');\n  };\n\n  const handleSkip = () => {\n    setDiagnosis(null);\n    setScanData(null);\n    setCapturesWithImages([]);\n    setView('scan');\n    setScanKey((k) => k + 1);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"App\">\n      {view !== 'tryon' && (\n        <header className=\"app-header\">\n          <p className=\"app-brand\">AI SUIT SIGNAGE</p>\n          <h1>AI体型診断サイネージ</h1>\n        </header>\n      )}\n\n      {view === 'scan' && (\n        <div className=\"camera-section\">\n          <PoseEstimation\n            key={scanKey}\n            onDiagnosisComplete={handleDiagnose}\n            isAnalyzing={loading}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {view === 'result' && diagnosis && (\n        <DiagnosisResult\n          data={diagnosis}\n          onStartVirtualTryOn={handleStartVirtualTryOn}\n          onSkip={handleSkip}\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {view === 'tryon' && diagnosis && capturesWithImages.length >= 4 && (\n        <VirtualTryOn\n          captures={capturesWithImages}\n          diagnosis={diagnosis}\n          onExit={handleExitTryOn}\n        />\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;\n"}

## Assistant

2.5Dバーチャル試着（Canvas + Verlet物理演算）を実装しました。Three.js / GLTF は使わず、**4方向の写真の上にスーツを合成描画**する方式です。

## 実装内容

### 新規ファイル

| ファイル | 役割 |

|---------|------|

| `VirtualTryOn.tsx` | 360°ビューア + 試着UI |

| `VirtualTryOn.css` | ギャラリー風の高級UI |

| `clothSimulation2d.ts` | Verlet物理演算（重力・制約・シワ描画） |

| `suitPatternParams.ts` | YA体/A体/AB体/BE体の型紙パラメータ |

| `suitRenderer.ts` | 写真+スーツ合成描画（正面/側面/背面） |

| `mockSuits.ts` | 5種類の架空スーツカタログ |

### 2.5D描画の仕組み

1. 4方向の撮影写真をベースに読み込み

2. 骨格キーポイント（肩・腰・肘など）から**肩幅・袖丈・着丈を自動調整**

3. 体型（YA体等）の型紙パラメータでスーツ形状をスケーリング

4. **Verlet布シミュレーション**で正面のラペル・前立てにシワ・ドレープを追加

5. 選択スーツの**色・柄（solid / pinstripe）**を反映

### 360°体験

- **ドラッグ/スワイプ**で正面→右→後ろ→左をスムーズ切替

- 方向ボタン（正面/右側/後ろ/左側）でもジャンプ可能

- 合成画像はスーツごとにキャッシュ

### 画面遷移

```

4方向撮影 → 診断結果 → 「バーチャル試着を開始」 → VirtualTryOn

```

- サイドバーに**カラー・サイズ・マッチ率・体型・骨格**を表示

- **「別のスーツを試着」**で mockSuits から色・スタイルを切替

- 「試着を終了」で診断結果画面に戻る

---

## 確認手順

1. 4方向撮影 → 診断完了

2. 「**バーチャル試着を開始**」をクリック

3. 写真の上にスーツが合成表示される

4. **左右ドラッグ**で360°回転

5. 右サイドバーで**別スーツを選択**して色を変更

---

## 補足

- 新規npmパッケージは**不要**（Canvas 2D + 自前Verlet実装）

- 将来的に店内商品一覧と連携するため`mockSuits.ts` を差し替えるだけで拡張可能

- 横向き・背面は方向別の専用シルエット描画、正面のみ布シミュレーション適用

試してみて、描画位置のズレやUI調整が必要なら教えてください。

## Assistant

**原因:** `<video>` に `display: none` が指定されており、ブラウザ上で映像サイズが **0×0** になっていました。MoveNet が内部で切り出し領域`yMin`）を計算できずクラッシュしていました。

## 修正内容

1. **video の CSS 変更**

   - `display: none` → 画面外に配置 + 明示的な `720×1280` サイズ

   - カメラ映像は非表示のまま、MoveNet が正しい解像度で読めるように

2. **ポーズ推定のガード追加**

   - `isVideoReady()` で `videoWidth > 0`・再生中などを確認してから `estimatePoses` を実行

   - `try/catch` でエラーを握りつぶさずスキップ

3. **ライフサイクル管理**

   - アンマウント時にカメラストリーム停止

   - 検出器の `dispose`

   - 非同期推定中のアンマウント対策`activeRef`）

---

フロントを **再読み込み（F5）** してから、再度撮影を試してください。まだエラーが出る場合は、発生タイミング（ページ表示直後 / 撮影ボタン押下時など）を教えてください。

## User

添付した「理想の合成画像」のようなクオリティを、実際のコードで実現します。以下の項目をすべて一括で実装・修正してください。

1．テクスチャマッピングの実装

(@suitRenderer.ts)

・「線と長方形」の描画を廃止し、添付したスーツの透過画像（PNG）をCanvas上に描画してください。

• F (left_shoulder, right_shoulder) <Iz

（left_hip, right_hip）のキーポイントを基準に、スーツ画像をあなたの体に合うようにスケーリング・変形させて配置してください。

・左右・背面についても、骨格の向きに合わせて画像を反転・伸縮させ、擬似的に 360°試着に見えるように工夫してください。

2． 座標ズレとデバッグ表示の修正

・現在、緑の線（スケルトン）が実際の体（黄色いライン）より上にズレています。このオフセットを完全に解消し、スーツが黄色いラインにピッタリ重なるようにしてください。

・修正が完了したら、緑色のドットと線は非表示にしてください。

3．初期表示の自動化（@VirtualTryOn.tsx）

・ページを開いた瞬間、ユーザーが操作しなくてもデフォルトのスーツ （ダークネイビー等）が着用された状態で表示されるようにしてください。

4. AI診断ロジックの差別化 （@[aiDiagnosis.py](http://aiDiagnosis.py)）

・全員が同じ結果（AB体など）になる問題を修正してください。肩幅・腰幅・身長の比率を厳密に計算し、人によって「A体」「YA体」「BE体」と明確に結果が分かれるようにアルゴリズムを刷新してください。

5. 5種類のスーツ展開

・mockSuits.ts のデータと連携し、サイドバーでスーツを選んだら、それぞれの透過画像に切り替わる準備をしてください（他の4枚の画像も後ほど渡します）。

この画像のような「本物感」と「正確なサイズ診断」を両立させてください！

### Tool Edit File V2

```

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\services\\coordinateTransform.ts","streamContent":"/** 撮影キャンバス解像度（PoseEstimation / VirtualTryOn 共通） */\nexport const CANVAS_W = 720;\nexport const CANVAS_H = 1280;\n\nexport interface Point2D {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n}\n\nexport interface MappedKeypoint extends Point2D {\n  name?: string;\n  score: number;\n}\n\n/**\n  *MoveNet の video 座標 → キャンバス座標（cover フィット + ミラー）\n*  mirror=true: 保存画像・試着合成と同じ最終ピクセル座標\n  *mirror=false: drawScene 内の反転済み ctx 上で描くときの座標\n* /\nexport function mapVideoPointToCanvas(\n  x: number,\n  y: number,\n  videoWidth: number,\n  videoHeight: number,\n  canvasWidth: number = CANVAS_W,\n  canvasHeight: number = CANVAS_H,\n  mirror = true\n): Point2D {\n  if (videoWidth <= 0 || videoHeight <= 0) {\n    return { x, y };\n  }\n\n  const scale = Math.max(canvasWidth / videoWidth, canvasHeight / videoHeight);\n  const dw = videoWidth  *scale;\n  const dh = videoHeight*  scale;\n  const dx = (canvasWidth - dw) / 2;\n  const dy = (canvasHeight - dh) / 2;\n\n  let cx = x  *scale + dx;\n  const cy = y*  scale + dy;\n\n  if (mirror) {\n    cx = canvasWidth - cx;\n  }\n\n  return { x: cx, y: cy };\n}\n\nexport function mapKeypointsToCanvas<T extends { x: number; y: number; name?: string; score?: number }>(\n  keypoints: T[],\n  videoWidth: number,\n  videoHeight: number,\n  canvasWidth: number = CANVAS_W,\n  canvasHeight: number = CANVAS_H,\n  mirror = true\n): MappedKeypoint[] {\n  return [keypoints.map](http://keypoints.map)((kp) => {\n    const mapped = mapVideoPointToCanvas(\n      kp.x,\n      kp.y,\n      videoWidth,\n      videoHeight,\n      canvasWidth,\n      canvasHeight,\n      mirror\n    );\n    return {\n      name: [kp.name](http://kp.name),\n      score: kp.score ?? 0,\n      x: mapped.x,\n      y: mapped.y,\n    };\n  });\n}\n"}

```

### Tool Edit File V2

```

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\services\\suitTextureLoader.ts","streamContent":"const textureCache = new Map<string, Promise<HTMLCanvasElement>>();\n\nfunction loadImage(src: string): Promise<HTMLImageElement> {\n  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n    const img = new Image();\n    img.onload = () => resolve(img);\n    img.onerror = reject;\n    img.src = src;\n  });\n}\n\nfunction hexToRgb(hex: string): { r: number; g: number; b: number } {\n  const n = parseInt(hex.replace('#', ''), 16);\n  return { r: (n >> 16) & 0xff, g: (n >> 8) & 0xff, b: n & 0xff };\n}\n\n/** 黒背景を透過化し、必要ならスーツ色にティント */\nfunction processSuitSheet(img: HTMLImageElement, tintHex?: string): HTMLCanvasElement {\n  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n  canvas.width = img.width;\n  canvas.height = img.height;\n  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n  if (!ctx) return canvas;\n\n  ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n  const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n  const data = [imageData.data](http://imageData.data);\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {\n    const r = data[i];\n    const g = data[i + 1];\n    const b = data[i + 2];\n    if (r < 32 && g < 32 && b < 32) {\n      data[i + 3] = 0;\n    }\n  }\n  ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n  if (tintHex) {\n    const tint = hexToRgb(tintHex);\n    const tinted = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const td = [tinted.data](http://tinted.data);\n    for (let i = 0; i < td.length; i += 4) {\n      if (td[i + 3] === 0) continue;\n      const lum = (td[i]*  0.299 + td[i + 1]  *0.587 + td[i + 2]*  0.114) / 255;\n      td[i] = Math.round(tint.r  *lum);\n      td[i + 1] = Math.round(tint.g*  lum);\n      td[i + 2] = Math.round(tint.b * lum);\n    }\n    ctx.putImageData(tinted, 0, 0);\n  }\n\n  return canvas;\n}\n\nexport async function loadSuitTexture(\n  sheetUrl: string,\n  tintHex?: string | null\n): Promise<HTMLCanvasElement> {\n  const cacheKey = `${sheetUrl}|${tintHex ?? 'none'}`;\n  const cached = textureCache.get(cacheKey);\n  if (cached) return cached;\n\n  const promise = loadImage(sheetUrl).then((img) => processSuitSheet(img, tintHex ?? undefined));\n  textureCache.set(cacheKey, promise);\n  return promise;\n}\n\nexport function clearSuitTextureCache(): void {\n  textureCache.clear();\n}\n"}

```

### Tool Edit File V2

```

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\services\\suitRenderer.ts","streamContent":"import { computeSuitDrawParams } from './suitPatternParams';\nimport { loadSuitTexture } from './suitTextureLoader';\nimport { MockSuit } from '../data/mockSuits';\n\nexport interface Keypoint {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n  score: number;\n}\n\nexport interface BodyAnchors {\n  shoulderLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  shoulderRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  neck: { x: number; y: number };\n}\n\ninterface Quad {\n  topLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  topRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  bottomLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  bottomRight: { x: number; y: number };\n}\n\nconst SHEET_COLS = 4;\n\n/** スプライト内のアンカー位置（肩・腰・裾） */\nconst TEX = {\n  shoulderY: 0.11,\n  shoulderL: 0.17,\n  shoulderR: 0.83,\n  hipY: 0.44,\n  hipL: 0.21,\n  hipR: 0.79,\n  bottomY: 0.97,\n};\n\nexport function keypointsToAnchors(keypoints: Keypoint[]): BodyAnchors | null {\n  const kp = (i: number) => keypoints[i];\n  const ok = (i: number) => kp(i) && kp(i).score > 0.3;\n  if (!ok(5) || !ok(6) || !ok(11) || !ok(12)) return null;\n\n  const neck = ok(0)\n    ? { x: kp(0).x, y: kp(0).y }\n    : {\n        x: (kp(5).x + kp(6).x) / 2,\n        y: (kp(5).y + kp(6).y) / 2 - 24,\n      };\n\n  return {\n    shoulderLeft: { x: kp(5).x, y: kp(5).y },\n    shoulderRight: { x: kp(6).x, y: kp(6).y },\n    hipLeft: { x: kp(11).x, y: kp(11).y },\n    hipRight: { x: kp(12).x, y: kp(12).y },\n    neck,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction lerp(a: number, b: number, t: number): number {\n  return a + (b - a)*  t;\n}\n\nfunction getSpriteConfig(direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270): { col: number; flipH: boolean } {\n  switch (direction) {\n    case 0:\n      return { col: 0, flipH: false };\n    case 90:\n      return { col: 1, flipH: false };\n    case 180:\n      return { col: 2, flipH: false };\n    case 270:\n      return { col: 3, flipH: false };\n    default:\n      return { col: 0, flipH: false };\n  }\n}\n\nfunction buildDestinationQuad(\n  anchors: BodyAnchors,\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270,\n  shoulderWidth: number,\n  torsoLength: number,\n  jacketLength: number\n): Quad {\n  const { shoulderLeft: sl, shoulderRight: sr, hipLeft: hl, hipRight: hr } = anchors;\n  const shoulderMid = { x: (sl.x + sr.x) / 2, y: (sl.y + sr.y) / 2 };\n  const hipMid = { x: (hl.x + hr.x) / 2, y: (hl.y + hr.y) / 2 };\n  const hipWidth = Math.hypot(hr.x - hl.x, hr.y - hl.y);\n  const bottomY = shoulderMid.y + jacketLength;\n\n  if (direction === 0 || direction === 180) {\n    const topY = shoulderMid.y - torsoLength  *0.12;\n    const pad = shoulderWidth*  0.06;\n    const hipPad = hipWidth  *0.08;\n    return {\n      topLeft: { x: sl.x - pad, y: topY },\n      topRight: { x: sr.x + pad, y: topY },\n      bottomLeft: { x: hipMid.x - hipWidth / 2 - hipPad, y: bottomY },\n      bottomRight: { x: hipMid.x + hipWidth / 2 + hipPad, y: bottomY },\n    };\n  }\n\n  const facingRight = direction === 90;\n  const shoulder = facingRight ? sr : sl;\n  const hip = facingRight ? hr : hl;\n  const depth = shoulderWidth*  0.58;\n  const sign = facingRight ? 1 : -1;\n  const topY = shoulder.y - torsoLength  *0.1;\n  const bottom = hip.y + torsoLength*  1.15;\n\n  return {\n    topLeft: { x: shoulder.x - depth  *0.32*  sign, y: topY },\n    topRight: { x: shoulder.x + depth  *0.68*  sign, y: topY },\n    bottomLeft: { x: hip.x - depth  *0.22*  sign, y: bottom },\n    bottomRight: { x: hip.x + depth  *0.58*  sign, y: bottom },\n  };\n}\n\n/** 台形ワープ（水平スライス）で PNG を肩・腰に合わせて描画 */\nfunction drawWarpedTexture(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  texture: HTMLCanvasElement,\n  sx: number,\n  sy: number,\n  sw: number,\n  sh: number,\n  quad: Quad,\n  flipH: boolean,\n  slices = 28\n) {\n  const { topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight } = quad;\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < slices; i++) {\n    const t0 = i / slices;\n    const t1 = (i + 1) / slices;\n    const srcY = sy + sh*  t0;\n    const srcH = sh  *(t1 - t0);\n\n    const leftX0 = lerp(topLeft.x, bottomLeft.x, t0);\n    const leftX1 = lerp(topLeft.x, bottomLeft.x, t1);\n    const rightX0 = lerp(topRight.x, bottomRight.x, t0);\n    const rightX1 = lerp(topRight.x, bottomRight.x, t1);\n    const y0 = lerp(topLeft.y, bottomLeft.y, t0);\n    const y1 = lerp(topLeft.y, bottomLeft.y, t1);\n\n    const destW = ((rightX0 + rightX1) / 2 - (leftX0 + leftX1) / 2);\n    const destH = y1 - y0;\n    const destX = (leftX0 + leftX1) / 2;\n\n    if (destW <= 0 || destH <= 0) continue;\n\n    [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n    if (flipH) {\n      ctx.translate(destX + destW, y0);\n      ctx.scale(-1, 1);\n      ctx.drawImage(texture, sx, srcY, sw, srcH, 0, 0, destW, destH);\n    } else {\n      ctx.drawImage(texture, sx, srcY, sw, srcH, destX, y0, destW, destH);\n    }\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function renderSuitComposite(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  photo: HTMLImageElement,\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270,\n  keypoints: Keypoint[],\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  bodyType: string,\n  sleeveLengthCm: number\n): Promise<void> {\n  const w = ctx.canvas.width;\n  const h = ctx.canvas.height;\n  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.drawImage(photo, 0, 0, w, h);\n\n  const anchors = keypointsToAnchors(keypoints);\n  if (!anchors) return;\n\n  const params = computeSuitDrawParams(anchors, bodyType, sleeveLengthCm);\n  const texture = await loadSuitTexture(suit.textures.sheet, suit.textures.tintHex);\n  const { col, flipH } = getSpriteConfig(direction);\n\n  const cellW = texture.width / SHEET_COLS;\n  const cellH = texture.height;\n  const sx = col*  cellW;\n  const quad = buildDestinationQuad(\n    anchors,\n    direction,\n    params.shoulderWidth,\n    params.torsoLength,\n    params.jacketLength\n  );\n\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.94;\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n\n  drawWarpedTexture(ctx, texture, sx, 0, cellW, cellH, quad, flipH);\n\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\data\\mockSuits.ts","streamContent":"export interface SuitTextures {\n  /** 4方向スプライトシート（正面 / 斜め / 背面 / 斜め後） */\n  sheet: string;\n  /** ベース画像への色替え（未指定なら原色） */\n  tintHex?: string | null;\n}\n\nexport interface MockSuit {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  colorName: string;\n  colorHex: string;\n  pattern: 'solid' | 'pinstripe' | 'herringbone';\n  style: 'slim' | 'regular' | 'classic';\n  matchBase: number;\n  description: string;\n  textures: SuitTextures;\n}\n\nconst BASE_SHEET = '/assets/suits/suit-base-sheet.png';\n\nexport const MOCK_SUITS: MockSuit[] = [\n  {\n    id: 'suit-001',\n    name: 'Super 120s 純粋ウール',\n    colorName: 'ダークネイビー',\n    colorHex: '#1a2744',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'slim',\n    matchBase: 96,\n    description: '上質ウールの定番ネイビー。ビジネスシーンに最適。',\n    textures: { sheet: BASE_SHEET, tintHex: '#1a2744' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-002',\n    name: 'イタリアンウール 2ボタン',\n    colorName: 'チャコールグレー',\n    colorHex: '#3d4555',\n    pattern: 'pinstripe',\n    style: 'regular',\n    matchBase: 92,\n    description: '細ストライプが知的な印象を与えるグレースーツ。',\n    textures: { sheet: BASE_SHEET, tintHex: null },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-003',\n    name: 'モヘアブレンド スリーピース',\n    colorName: 'ミディアムグレー',\n    colorHex: '#6b7280',\n    pattern: 'herringbone',\n    style: 'classic',\n    matchBase: 88,\n    description: 'ヘリンボーン柄がクラシックな雰囲気を演出。',\n    textures: { sheet: BASE_SHEET, tintHex: '#6b7280' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-004',\n    name: 'トロピカルウール サマー',\n    colorName: 'ライトグレー',\n    colorHex: '#9ca3af',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'slim',\n    matchBase: 85,\n    description: '通気性に優れた夏向けライトトーン。',\n    textures: { sheet: BASE_SHEET, tintHex: '#b8bcc4' },\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'suit-005',\n    name: 'フランネル ウィンター',\n    colorName: 'ダークブラウン',\n    colorHex: '#4a3728',\n    pattern: 'solid',\n    style: 'regular',\n    matchBase: 90,\n    description: '秋冬に映える深みのあるブラウン。',\n    textures: { sheet: BASE_SHEET, tintHex: '#4a3728' },\n  },\n];\n\nexport function getMockSuitById(id: string): MockSuit {\n  return MOCK_SUITS.find((s) => [s.id](http://s.id) === id) || MOCK_SUITS[0];\n}\n\nexport function mockSuitFromDiagnosis(\n  recommended: { id: string; name: string; color: string; matchPercentage: number },\n  index: number\n): MockSuit {\n  const base = MOCK_SUITS[index % MOCK_SUITS.length];\n  return {\n    ...base,\n    id: [recommended.id](http://recommended.id) || [base.id](http://base.id),\n    name: [recommended.name](http://recommended.name) || [base.name](http://base.name),\n    colorName: recommended.color || base.colorName,\n    matchBase: recommended.matchPercentage || base.matchBase,\n  };\n}\n"}

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\frontend\\src\\components\\VirtualTryOn.tsx","streamContent":"import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';\nimport { CaptureData } from './PoseEstimation';\nimport { DiagnosisData } from './DiagnosisResult';\nimport { renderSuitComposite } from '../services/suitRenderer';\nimport { MOCK_SUITS, MockSuit, getMockSuitById } from '../data/mockSuits';\nimport './VirtualTryOn.css';\n\nconst DIRECTIONS: Array<0 | 90 | 180 | 270> = [0, 90, 180, 270];\nconst DIRECTION_LABELS: Record<number, string> = {\n  0: '正面',\n  90: '右側',\n  180: '後ろ',\n  270: '左側',\n};\n\nconst DEFAULT_SUIT_ID = 'suit-001';\n\ninterface VirtualTryOnProps {\n  captures: CaptureData[];\n  diagnosis: DiagnosisData;\n  onExit: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction loadImage(src: string): Promise<HTMLImageElement> {\n  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n    const img = new Image();\n    img.onload = () => resolve(img);\n    img.onerror = reject;\n    img.src = src;\n  });\n}\n\nfunction angleToDirection(angle: number): 0 | 90 | 180 | 270 {\n  const normalized = ((angle % 360) + 360) % 360;\n  if (normalized < 45 || normalized >= 315) return 0;\n  if (normalized < 135) return 90;\n  if (normalized < 225) return 180;\n  return 270;\n}\n\nexport const VirtualTryOn: React.FC<VirtualTryOnProps> = ({\n  captures,\n  diagnosis,\n  onExit,\n}) => {\n  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);\n  const compositeCacheRef = useRef<Map<string, HTMLCanvasElement>>(new Map());\n  const dragRef = useRef<{ startX: number; startAngle: number } | null>(null);\n\n  const [rotationAngle, setRotationAngle] = useState(0);\n  const [selectedSuitId, setSelectedSuitId] = useState(DEFAULT_SUIT_ID);\n  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);\n  const [isCompositing, setIsCompositing] = useState(true);\n  const [renderTick, setRenderTick] = useState(0);\n\n  const selectedSuit = getMockSuitById(selectedSuitId);\n  const recommended = diagnosis.recommendedSuits.find((s) => [s.id](http://s.id) === selectedSuitId);\n\n  const buildCompositeKey = useCallback(\n    (direction: number, suitId: string) => `${direction}-${suitId}`,\n    []\n  );\n\n  const renderComposite = useCallback(\n    async (direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270, suit: MockSuit) => {\n      const key = buildCompositeKey(direction, [suit.id](http://suit.id));\n      if (compositeCacheRef.current.has(key)) return;\n\n      const capture = captures.find((c) => c.direction === direction);\n      if (!capture?.imageDataUrl) return;\n\n      const photo = await loadImage(capture.imageDataUrl);\n      const offscreen = document.createElement('canvas');\n      offscreen.width = 720;\n      offscreen.height = 1280;\n      const ctx = offscreen.getContext('2d');\n      if (!ctx) return;\n\n      await renderSuitComposite(\n        ctx,\n        photo,\n        direction,\n        capture.keypoints,\n        suit,\n        diagnosis.bodyType,\n        diagnosis.suitSize.sleeveLengthCm\n      );\n\n      compositeCacheRef.current.set(key, offscreen);\n      setRenderTick((t) => t + 1);\n    },\n    [buildCompositeKey, captures, diagnosis]\n  );\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let cancelled = false;\n\n    const run = async () => {\n      setIsCompositing(true);\n      compositeCacheRef.current.clear();\n\n      await Promise.all([DIRECTIONS.map](http://DIRECTIONS.map)((d) => renderComposite(d, selectedSuit)));\n\n      if (!cancelled) {\n        setIsCompositing(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    run();\n    return () => {\n      cancelled = true;\n    };\n  }, [selectedSuitId, captures, renderComposite, selectedSuit]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const canvas = canvasRef.current;\n    if (!canvas) return;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const dirA = angleToDirection(rotationAngle);\n    const dirB = angleToDirection(rotationAngle + 45);\n    const t = (rotationAngle % 90) / 90;\n\n    const keyA = buildCompositeKey(dirA, selectedSuitId);\n    const keyB = buildCompositeKey(dirB, selectedSuitId);\n    const imgA = compositeCacheRef.current.get(keyA);\n    const imgB = compositeCacheRef.current.get(keyB);\n\n    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    ctx.fillStyle = '#0b1424';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    if (imgA && imgB && dirA !== dirB) {\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1 - t;\n      ctx.drawImage(imgA, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = t;\n      ctx.drawImage(imgB, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n    } else if (imgA) {\n      ctx.drawImage(imgA, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    }\n  }, [rotationAngle, selectedSuitId, renderTick, buildCompositeKey]);\n\n  const handlePointerDown = (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n    dragRef.current = { startX: e.clientX, startAngle: rotationAngle };\n    setIsDragging(true);\n    ([e.target](http://e.target) as HTMLElement).setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);\n  };\n\n  const handlePointerMove = (e: React.PointerEvent) => {\n    if (!dragRef.current) return;\n    const dx = e.clientX - dragRef.current.startX;\n    setRotationAngle(dragRef.current.startAngle + dx  *0.5);\n  };\n\n  const handlePointerUp = () => {\n    if (!dragRef.current) return;\n    const nearest = Math.round(rotationAngle / 90)*  90;\n    setRotationAngle(nearest);\n    dragRef.current = null;\n    setIsDragging(false);\n  };\n\n  const currentLabel = DIRECTION_LABELS[angleToDirection(rotationAngle)];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"virtual-tryon\">\n      <header className=\"tryon-header\">\n        <p className=\"tryon-brand\">VIRTUAL FITTING</p>\n        <h1>バーチャル試着</h1>\n        <p className=\"tryon-sub\">ドラッグして360°確認</p>\n      </header>\n\n      <div className=\"tryon-layout\">\n        <div className=\"tryon-viewer-wrap\">\n          <canvas\n            ref={canvasRef}\n            width={720}\n            height={1280}\n            className=`tryon-canvas ${isDragging ? 'dragging' : ''}`}\n            onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}\n            onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}\n            onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}\n            onPointerLeave={handlePointerUp}\n          />\n          {isCompositing && (\n            <div className=\"tryon-loading\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n              スーツを合成しています…\n            </div>\n          )}\n          <div className=\"rotation-badge\">{currentLabel}</div>\n          <div className=\"rotation-dots\">\n            {[DIRECTIONS.map](http://DIRECTIONS.map)((d) => (\n              <button\n                key={d}\n                type=\"button\"\n                className=`rot-dot ${angleToDirection(rotationAngle) === d ? 'active' : ''}`}\n                onClick={() => setRotationAngle(d)}\n              >\n                {DIRECTION_LABELS[d]}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <aside className=\"tryon-sidebar\">\n          <div className=\"suit-info-card\">\n            <p className=\"sidebar-label\">SELECTED SUIT</p>\n            <h2>{[selectedSuit.name](http://selectedSuit.name)}</h2>\n            <div className=\"color-swatch\" style={{ background: selectedSuit.colorHex }} />\n            <dl className=\"suit-specs\">\n              <div>\n                <dt>カラー</dt>\n                <dd>{selectedSuit.colorName}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>サイズ</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.suitSize.jacketSize}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>マッチ率</dt>\n                <dd>{recommended?.matchPercentage ?? selectedSuit.matchBase}%</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>体型</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.bodyType}</dd>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <dt>骨格</dt>\n                <dd>{diagnosis.skeleton}</dd>\n              </div>\n            </dl>\n            <p className=\"suit-desc\">{selectedSuit.description}</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"suit-picker\">\n            <p className=\"sidebar-label\">別のスーツを試着</p>\n            <div className=\"suit-picker-list\">\n              {MOCK_[SUITS.map](http://SUITS.map)((suit) => (\n                <button\n                  key={[suit.id](http://suit.id)}\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=`suit-picker-item ${selectedSuitId === suit.id ? 'selected' : ''}`}\n                  onClick={() => setSelectedSuitId([suit.id](http://suit.id))}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"picker-swatch\" style={{ background: suit.colorHex }} />\n                  <span className=\"picker-name\">{suit.colorName}</span>\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <button type=\"button\" className=\"exit-btn\" onClick={onExit}>\n            試着を終了\n          </button>\n        </aside>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n"}

### Tool Edit File V2

```

{"path":"C:\\Users\\asuka\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\プログラミング\\プログラミング\\博報堂プロダクツ　デジタルサイネージ\\スーツサイネージ\\backend\\services\\[aiDiagnosis.py](http://aiDiagnosis.py)","streamContent":"def analyze_body_type(metrics):\n    \"\"\"\n    体型判定（肩幅・腰幅・身長の比率をスコアリング）\n    YA体: 細身・肩腰バランス細め\n    A体:  標準プロポーション\n    AB体: 肩幅が相対的に広い・がっしり\n    BE体: 腰幅が相対的に広い・ゆったり\n    \"\"\"\n    shoulder = metrics[\"shoulder_px\"]\n    hip = metrics[\"hip_px\"]\n    body_h = metrics[\"body_height_px\"]\n    depth = metrics[\"torso_depth_px\"]\n\n    if body_h <= 0:\n        body_h = max(shoulder  *3, hip*  3, 1)\n\n    hip_safe = hip if hip > 10 else shoulder  *0.88\n    shoulder_safe = shoulder if shoulder > 10 else hip_safe*  1.02\n\n    shoulder_ratio = shoulder_safe / body_h\n    hip_ratio = hip_safe / body_h\n    sh_hip_ratio = shoulder_safe / hip_safe if hip_safe > 0 else 1.0\n    depth_ratio = depth / shoulder_safe if shoulder_safe > 0 else 0.15\n    bulk_index = (hip_ratio + depth_ratio  *0.35) / 2\n\n    scores = {\n        \"YA体 (スリム)\": 0.0,\n        \"A体 (標準)\": 0.0,\n        \"AB体 (がっしり)\": 0.0,\n        \"BE体 (ゆったり)\": 0.0,\n    }\n\n    # YA: 肩身比が低く、体厚が薄い、肩≧腰\n    scores[\"YA体 (スリム)\"] += clamp(0.235 - shoulder_ratio, 0, 0.06)*  90\n    scores[\"YA体 (スリム)\"] += clamp(0.19 - depth_ratio, 0, 0.08)  *70\n    scores[\"YA体 (スリム)\"] += clamp(sh_hip_ratio - 0.98, 0, 0.12)*  40\n    scores[\"YA体 (スリム)\"] += clamp(0.36 - hip_ratio, 0, 0.05)  *35\n\n    # A: 中庸ゾーン（肩身比・腰身比・肩腰差）\n    a_center = abs(shoulder_ratio - 0.248)*  120\n    hip_center = abs(hip_ratio - 0.355)  *80\n    balance = abs(sh_hip_ratio - 1.02)*  55\n    scores[\"A体 (標準)\"] += clamp(1.4 - a_center - hip_center  *0.5 - balance*  0.4, 0, 1.4)  *55\n    scores[\"A体 (標準)\"] += clamp(0.28 - abs(depth_ratio - 0.18), 0, 0.28)*  25\n\n    # AB: 肩幅が相対的に広い、体厚やや厚め\n    scores[\"AB体 (がっしり)\"] += clamp(shoulder_ratio - 0.252, 0, 0.05)  *110\n    scores[\"AB体 (がっしり)\"] += clamp(sh_hip_ratio - 1.04, 0, 0.14)*  75\n    scores[\"AB体 (がっしり)\"] += clamp(depth_ratio - 0.17, 0, 0.12)  *45\n\n    # BE: 腰幅が相対的に広い、または全体的にボリューム大\n    scores[\"BE体 (ゆったり)\"] += clamp(hip_ratio - 0.36, 0, 0.06)*  100\n    scores[\"BE体 (ゆったり)\"] += clamp(0.98 - sh_hip_ratio, 0, 0.14)  *85\n    scores[\"BE体 (ゆったり)\"] += clamp(bulk_index - 0.22, 0, 0.12)*  60\n    scores[\"BE体 (ゆったり)\"] += clamp(shoulder_ratio - 0.275, 0, 0.04) * 40\n\n    body_type = max(scores, key=scores.get)\n    margin = sorted(scores.values(), reverse=True)\n    if len(margin) > 1 and margin[0] - margin[1] < 4:\n        # 僅差のときは比率の優先順位で決定\n        if shoulder_ratio < 0.228 and depth_ratio < 0.17:\n            body_type = \"YA体 (スリム)\"\n        elif hip_ratio > 0.365 and sh_hip_ratio < 1.0:\n            body_type = \"BE体 (ゆったり)\"\n        elif shoulder_ratio > 0.258 and sh_hip_ratio > 1.05:\n            body_type = \"AB体 (がっしり)\"\n        else:\n            body_type = \"A体 (標準)\"\n\n    return body_type"}

```

## Assistant

依頼いただいた5項目を一括で実装しました。ビルドも成功しています。

## 実装内容

### 1. PNGテクスチャマッピング`suitRenderer.ts`）

- 線・長方形描画を廃止し、透過PNGをCanvasに描画

- `left_shoulder` / `right_shoulder` / `left_hip` / `right_hip` を基準に台形ワープ（水平スライス）でスケール・変形

- 4方向スプライトシート（正面 / 斜め / 背面 / 斜め後）を方向に応じて切り替え

- 黒背景の自動透過処理`suitTextureLoader.ts`）

### 2. 座標ズレ修正 + デバッグ非表示

- **原因**: MoveNet座標（video空間）と、cover+ミラー後のキャンバス座標が不一致

- **修正**: `coordinateTransform.ts` を追加し、撮影時にキャンバス座標へ変換して保存

- 緑のスケルトン（ドット・線）を非表示化

### 3. 初期表示の自動化`VirtualTryOn.tsx`）

- デフォルトスーツを **ダークネイビー（suit-001）** に固定

- マウント時に4方向すべて `Promise.all` で自動合成

- 「スーツを合成しています…」ローディング表示

### 4. AI診断の差別化`aiDiagnosis.py`）

- 肩幅比・腰幅比・肩腰比・体厚をスコアリング方式に刷新

- 全員が AB体 になりやすかった `or` 条件を廃止

- YA / A / AB / BE が人ごとに分かれるよう調整

### 5. 5種類スーツ連携`mockSuits.ts`）

- 各スーツに `textures.sheet` / `textures.tintHex` を追加

- 添付PNGを `frontend/public/assets/suits/suit-base-sheet.png` に配置

- チャコールグレー（suit-002）は原色、その他はティントで色替え（専用PNG差し替え可能）

---

## 追加・変更ファイル

| ファイル | 内容 |

|---------|------|

| `coordinateTransform.ts` | video → canvas 座標変換 |

| `suitTextureLoader.ts` | PNG読込・透過・ティント |

| `suitRenderer.ts` | PNGワープ描画 |

| `mockSuits.ts` | テクスチャ定義 |

| `PoseEstimation.tsx` | 座標修正・スケルトン非表示 |

| `VirtualTryOn.tsx` | 自動合成・デフォルトスーツ |

| `aiDiagnosis.py` | 体型判定刷新 |

| `public/assets/suits/suit-base-sheet.png` | 4方向スプライト |

---

## 確認手順

1. **再スキャンが必要です** — 座標修正は新規撮影データに反映されます（既存セッションは古い座標のまま）

2. 4方向撮影 → 診断 → 試着画面へ

3. 開いた瞬間からダークネイビーが合成表示されることを確認

4. サイドバーで5色を切り替え、テクスチャが変わることを確認

## 残り4枚のPNGを渡すとき

`mockSuits.ts` の各スーツの `textures.sheet` を個別パスに差し替えてください。例:

```typescript

textures: { sheet: '/assets/suits/suit-003-sheet.png', tintHex: null }

```

ファイル名の規則を決めたい場合（例: `suit-{id}-sheet.png`）はお知らせください。合わせて設定します。

実装済みの内容は次のとおりです。

- **PNGテクスチャマッピング** — 肩・腰キーポイント基準で4方向スプライトを合成

- **座標ズレ修正** — 撮影時にキャンバス座標へ変換、緑スケルトンは非表示

- **試着画面** — 開いた瞬間からダークネイビー（suit-001）を自動表示

**座標修正を反映するには、4方向の再撮影が必要です。** 残り4枚のスーツPNGが届いたら`mockSuits.ts` の `textures.sheet` を差し替えるだけで対応できます。

## User

スーツのスケールと方向の修

正

スーツが表示されましたが、以下の不具合を修正してください。

1．スーツのスケール（大きさ）の修正

(@suitRenderer.ts)

・現在、スーツが体に対して小さすぎます。画像全体のサイズではなく、*＊「画像内のスーツの肩幅」と「ユーザーの肩幅」**が1:1で一致するようにスケーリングを計算し直してください。

•スーツの画像には余白があるため、その余白を考慮して描画倍率を2～3倍程度大きく調整してください。

2.描画位置（アンカー）の修正

•スーツの襟が、ユーザーの neck またはshoulders の中心点に正確に重なるように配置を微調整してください。

3．側面・背面での描画ロジックの修正

・横や後ろを向いた時にスーツが消えてしまう、または正面の画像が薄く見えるだけになっています。

•修正：横・後ろの時も、スプライトシート内の該する向きの画像を確実に切り出して表示してください。また、横向きの時は「体の厚み」に合わせて、画像の幅を適切に維持（縮めすぎない）するようにしてください。

4.重なり順の確認

・スーツがユーザーの写真の「前面」に、正しい大きさで重なるようにしてください。

「体型に合わせた等身大の試着」になるよう、スケーリングロジックを抜本的に見直してください。

number;\n}\n\nexport interface BodyAnchors {\n  shoulderLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  shoulderRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipLeft: { x: number; y: number };\n  hipRight: { x: number; y: number };\n  neck: { x: number; y: number };\n}\n\ninterface Point2D {\n  x: number;\n  y: number;\n}\n\ninterface Quad {\n  topLeft: Point2D;\n  topRight: Point2D;\n  bottomLeft: Point2D;\n  bottomRight: Point2D;\n}\n\ninterface CellBounds {\n  /** セル内絶対座標（px） */\n  left: number;\n  top: number;\n  right: number;\n  bottom: number;\n  collarX: number;\n  collarY: number;\n  shoulderY: number;\n  shoulderLeftX: number;\n  shoulderRightX: number;\n  hipY: number;\n  hipLeftX: number;\n  hipRightX: number;\n}\n\nconst SHEET_COLS = 4;\nconst boundsCache = new Map<string, CellBounds>();\n\nexport function keypointsToAnchors(\n  keypoints: Keypoint[],\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270 = 0\n): BodyAnchors | null {\n  const kp = (i: number) => keypoints[i];\n  const score = (i: number) => kp(i)?.score ?? 0;\n\n  const ls = kp(5);\n  const rs = kp(6);\n  const hl = kp(11);\n  const hr = kp(12);\n  if (!ls || !rs || !hl || !hr) return null;\n\n  const minScore = direction === 0 || direction === 180 ? 0.3 : 0.15;\n  const hasLS = score(5) > minScore;\n  const hasRS = score(6) > minScore;\n  const hasHL = score(11) > minScore;\n  const hasHR = score(12) > minScore;\n\n  if (!hasHL || !hasHR) return null;\n  if (!hasLS && !hasRS) return null;\n\n  let shoulderLeft = { x: ls.x, y: ls.y };\n  let shoulderRight = { x: rs.x, y: rs.y };\n\n  const hipMid = { x: (hl.x + hr.x) / 2, y: (hl.y + hr.y) / 2 };\n  const torsoLen = Math.abs(hipMid.y - (hasLS ? ls.y : rs.y));\n\n  if (!hasLS && hasRS) {\n    const span = Math.max(torsoLen*  0.38, 48);\n    shoulderLeft = { x: rs.x - span, y: rs.y };\n  } else if (hasLS && !hasRS) {\n    const span = Math.max(torsoLen  *0.38, 48);\n    shoulderRight = { x: ls.x + span, y: ls.y };\n  }\n\n  const shoulderMid = {\n    x: (shoulderLeft.x + shoulderRight.x) / 2,\n    y: (shoulderLeft.y + shoulderRight.y) / 2,\n  };\n\n  const neck = score(0) > 0.2 && kp(0)\n    ? { x: kp(0).x, y: kp(0).y }\n    : {\n        x: shoulderMid.x,\n        y: shoulderMid.y - Math.max(18, torsoLen*  0.12),\n      };\n\n  return {\n    shoulderLeft,\n    shoulderRight,\n    hipLeft: { x: hl.x, y: hl.y },\n    hipRight: { x: hr.x, y: hr.y },\n    neck,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction lerp(a: number, b: number, t: number): number {\n  return a + (b - a)  *t;\n}\n\nfunction getSpriteConfig(direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270): { col: number; flipH: boolean } {\n  switch (direction) {\n    case 0:\n      return { col: 0, flipH: false };\n    case 90:\n      return { col: 1, flipH: true };\n    case 180:\n      return { col: 2, flipH: false };\n    case 270:\n      return { col: 3, flipH: false };\n    default:\n      return { col: 0, flipH: false };\n  }\n}\n\n/** スプライトセル内のスーツ実寸（透過ピクセル）を計測 */\nfunction measureCellBounds(texture: HTMLCanvasElement, col: number): CellBounds {\n  const cacheKey =* `${texture.width}x${texture.height}:${col}`*;\n  const cached = boundsCache.get(cacheKey);\n  if (cached) return cached;\n\n  const cellW = Math.floor(texture.width / SHEET_COLS);\n  const cellH = texture.height;\n  const baseX = col*  cellW;\n\n  const ctx = texture.getContext('2d');\n  if (!ctx) {\n    return fallbackBounds(baseX, cellW, cellH);\n  }\n\n  const imageData = ctx.getImageData(baseX, 0, cellW, cellH);\n  const { data, width, height } = imageData;\n\n  let minX = width;\n  let minY = height;\n  let maxX = 0;\n  let maxY = 0;\n\n  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {\n    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n      const alpha = data[(y  *width + x)*  4 + 3];\n      if (alpha > 24) {\n        minX = Math.min(minX, x);\n        minY = Math.min(minY, y);\n        maxX = Math.max(maxX, x);\n        maxY = Math.max(maxY, y);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (minX >= maxX || minY >= maxY) {\n    return fallbackBounds(baseX, cellW, cellH);\n  }\n\n  const contentW = maxX - minX;\n  const contentH = maxY - minY;\n  const absLeft = baseX + minX;\n  const absRight = baseX + maxX;\n\n  const bounds: CellBounds = {\n    left: absLeft,\n    top: minY,\n    right: absRight,\n    bottom: maxY,\n    collarX: baseX + minX + contentW  *0.5,\n    collarY: minY + contentH*  0.04,\n    shoulderY: minY + contentH  *0.1,\n    shoulderLeftX: baseX + minX + contentW*  0.1,\n    shoulderRightX: baseX + maxX - contentW  *0.1,\n    hipY: minY + contentH*  0.46,\n    hipLeftX: baseX + minX + contentW  *0.14,\n    hipRightX: baseX + maxX - contentW*  0.14,\n  };\n\n  boundsCache.set(cacheKey, bounds);\n  return bounds;\n}\n\nfunction fallbackBounds(baseX: number, cellW: number, cellH: number): CellBounds {\n  const padX = cellW  *0.12;\n  const padY = cellH*  0.04;\n  return {\n    left: baseX + padX,\n    top: padY,\n    right: baseX + cellW - padX,\n    bottom: cellH - padY,\n    collarX: baseX + cellW  *0.5,\n    collarY: padY + cellH*  0.02,\n    shoulderY: padY + cellH  *0.1,\n    shoulderLeftX: baseX + padX + cellW*  0.06,\n    shoulderRightX: baseX + cellW - padX - cellW  *0.06,\n    hipY: padY + cellH*  0.46,\n    hipLeftX: baseX + padX + cellW  *0.08,\n    hipRightX: baseX + cellW - padX - cellW*  0.08,\n  };\n}\n\ninterface PlacementSpec {\n  srcLeft: number;\n  srcTop: number;\n  srcW: number;\n  srcH: number;\n  quad: Quad;\n  flipH: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n  *テクスチャ内スーツ肩幅 ↔ ユーザー肩幅を 1:1 に合わせた配置\n* /\nfunction buildPlacement(\n  bounds: CellBounds,\n  anchors: BodyAnchors,\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270,\n  shoulderWidth: number,\n  torsoLength: number,\n  jacketLength: number,\n  flipH: boolean\n): PlacementSpec {\n  const { shoulderLeft: sl, shoulderRight: sr, hipLeft: hl, hipRight: hr, neck } = anchors;\n  const shoulderMid = { x: (sl.x + sr.x) / 2, y: (sl.y + sr.y) / 2 };\n  const hipMid = { x: (hl.x + hr.x) / 2, y: (hl.y + hr.y) / 2 };\n  const hipWidth = Math.hypot(hr.x - hl.x, hr.y - hl.y);\n  const measuredShoulder = Math.hypot(sr.x - sl.x, sr.y - sl.y);\n\n  const texShoulderSpan = Math.max(bounds.shoulderRightX - bounds.shoulderLeftX, 1);\n  const texTorsoSpan = Math.max(bounds.hipY - bounds.collarY, 1);\n\n  const collarAnchor: Point2D = {\n    x: neck.x  *0.35 + shoulderMid.x*  0.65,\n    y: Math.min(neck.y + torsoLength  *0.06, shoulderMid.y - 6),\n  };\n\n  const srcLeft = bounds.left;\n  const srcTop = [bounds.top](http://bounds.top);\n  const srcW = bounds.right - bounds.left;\n  const srcH = bounds.bottom - [bounds.top](http://bounds.top);\n\n  if (direction === 0 || direction === 180) {\n    const scale = shoulderWidth / texShoulderSpan;\n    const bottomY = hipMid.y + jacketLength*  0.95;\n\n    const mapTex = (tx: number, ty: number): Point2D => ({\n      x: collarAnchor.x + (tx - bounds.collarX)  *scale,\n      y: collarAnchor.y + (ty - bounds.collarY)*  scale,\n    });\n\n    const topLeft = mapTex(bounds.shoulderLeftX, bounds.shoulderY);\n    const topRight = mapTex(bounds.shoulderRightX, bounds.shoulderY);\n    const bottomLeft = mapTex(bounds.hipLeftX, bounds.hipY);\n    const bottomRight = mapTex(bounds.hipRightX, bounds.hipY);\n\n    const hipScaleY = (bottomY - collarAnchor.y) / (bounds.bottom - bounds.collarY) / scale;\n\n    return {\n      srcLeft,\n      srcTop,\n      srcW,\n      srcH,\n      flipH,\n      quad: {\n        topLeft,\n        topRight,\n        bottomLeft: {\n          x: lerp(bottomLeft.x, hipMid.x - hipWidth  *0.52, 0.35),\n          y: bottomY,\n        },\n        bottomRight: {\n          x: lerp(bottomRight.x, hipMid.x + hipWidth*  0.52, 0.35),\n          y: bottomY,\n        },\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  // 側面: 肩キーポイントが近くても体厚ベースで幅を確保\n  const facingRight = direction === 90;\n  const visibleShoulder = facingRight ? sr : sl;\n  const visibleHip = facingRight ? hr : hl;\n  const bodyDepth = Math.max(\n    measuredShoulder  *2.2,\n    hipWidth*  0.92,\n    torsoLength  *0.55,\n    shoulderWidth*  0.95,\n    110\n  );\n\n  const sideCollar: Point2D = {\n    x: visibleShoulder.x,\n    y: Math.min(neck.y + torsoLength  *0.04, visibleShoulder.y - 8),\n  };\n\n  const scale = bodyDepth / texShoulderSpan;\n  const bottomY = visibleHip.y + jacketLength*  0.9;\n\n  const mapTexSide = (tx: number, ty: number): Point2D => ({\n    x: sideCollar.x + (tx - bounds.collarX)  *scale,\n    y: sideCollar.y + (ty - bounds.collarY)*  scale,\n  });\n\n  const topLeft = mapTexSide(bounds.shoulderLeftX, bounds.shoulderY);\n  const topRight = mapTexSide(bounds.shoulderRightX, bounds.shoulderY);\n  const bottomLeft = mapTexSide(bounds.hipLeftX, bounds.hipY);\n  const bottomRight = mapTexSide(bounds.hipRightX, bounds.hipY);\n\n  const depthSign = facingRight ? 1 : -1;\n  const centerX = visibleShoulder.x + bodyDepth  *0.08*  depthSign;\n\n  return {\n    srcLeft,\n    srcTop,\n    srcW,\n    srcH,\n    flipH,\n    quad: {\n      topLeft: { x: centerX - bodyDepth  *0.52, y: topLeft.y },\n      topRight: { x: centerX + bodyDepth*  0.48, y: topRight.y },\n      bottomLeft: { x: centerX - bodyDepth  *0.46, y: bottomY },\n      bottomRight: { x: centerX + bodyDepth*  0.44, y: bottomY },\n    },\n  };\n}\n\n/** 台形ワープ（水平スライス） */\nfunction drawWarpedTexture(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  texture: HTMLCanvasElement,\n  sx: number,\n  sy: number,\n  sw: number,\n  sh: number,\n  quad: Quad,\n  flipH: boolean,\n  slices = 32\n) {\n  const { topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight } = quad;\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < slices; i++) {\n    const t0 = i / slices;\n    const t1 = (i + 1) / slices;\n    const srcY = sy + sh*  t0;\n    const srcH = sh * (t1 - t0);\n\n    const leftX0 = lerp(topLeft.x, bottomLeft.x, t0);\n    const leftX1 = lerp(topLeft.x, bottomLeft.x, t1);\n    const rightX0 = lerp(topRight.x, bottomRight.x, t0);\n    const rightX1 = lerp(topRight.x, bottomRight.x, t1);\n    const y0 = lerp(topLeft.y, bottomLeft.y, t0);\n    const y1 = lerp(topLeft.y, bottomLeft.y, t1);\n\n    const destLeft = (leftX0 + leftX1) / 2;\n    const destRight = (rightX0 + rightX1) / 2;\n    const destW = destRight - destLeft;\n    const destH = y1 - y0;\n\n    if (destW <= 1 || destH <= 0) continue;\n\n    [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n    if (flipH) {\n      ctx.translate(destLeft + destW, y0);\n      ctx.scale(-1, 1);\n      ctx.drawImage(texture, sx, srcY, sw, srcH, 0, 0, destW, destH);\n    } else {\n      ctx.drawImage(texture, sx, srcY, sw, srcH, destLeft, y0, destW, destH);\n    }\n    ctx.restore();\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function renderSuitComposite(\n  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,\n  photo: HTMLImageElement,\n  direction: 0 | 90 | 180 | 270,\n  keypoints: Keypoint[],\n  suit: MockSuit,\n  bodyType: string,\n  sleeveLengthCm: number\n): Promise<void> {\n  const w = ctx.canvas.width;\n  const h = ctx.canvas.height;\n  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);\n  ctx.drawImage(photo, 0, 0, w, h);\n\n  const anchors = keypointsToAnchors(keypoints, direction);\n  if (!anchors) return;\n\n  const params = computeSuitDrawParams(anchors, bodyType, sleeveLengthCm);\n  const texture = await loadSuitTexture(suit.textures.sheet, suit.textures.tintHex);\n  const { col, flipH } = getSpriteConfig(direction);\n  const bounds = measureCellBounds(texture, col);\n\n  const placement = buildPlacement(\n    bounds,\n    anchors,\n    direction,\n    params.shoulderWidth,\n    params.torsoLength,\n    params.jacketLength,\n    flipH\n  );\n\n  [ctx.save](http://ctx.save)();\n  ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n\n  drawWarpedTexture(\n    ctx,\n    texture,\n    placement.srcLeft,\n    placement.srcTop,\n    placement.srcW,\n    placement.srcH,\n    placement.quad,\n    placement.flipH\n  );\n\n  ctx.restore();\n}\n\nexport function clearSuitBoundsCache(): void {\n  boundsCache.clear();\n}\n"}

```
